title: Parkio Daily for July 8, 2026
teaser: Pirates of the Caribbean closed all day at Disneyland; Moana sundae arrives at Animal Kingdom; Joe Schott starts as WDW president Aug 3.

breaking.title: Pirates of the Caribbean closed all day at Disneyland
breaking.body: The classic New Orleans Square attraction failed to open with the park on July 7 and remained closed through the afternoon. No reopening timeline has been announced.

parkioInsight.text: If Pirates reopens today, waits may spike with guests making up for yesterday. Check the app before heading to New Orleans Square and have a backup plan for Haunted Mansion or Indy.

bignews.title: Joe Schott takes over as Walt Disney World president August 3
bignews.body: Nearly four months after leadership changes began across Disney, Schott officially assumes the WDW president role in less than a month. The transition marks the final major change in the parks division.

parkioInsight.text: New leadership often brings operational tweaks in the first 90 days. Worth keeping an eye on any policy shifts around park hours, Lightning Lane, or guest services through early fall.

bignews.title: Ken Potrock announces retirement after 32 years with Disney
bignews.body: The former Disneyland Resort president, currently serving as President of Major Events Integration, will officially retire in early 2027. Potrock's departure closes a long chapter in West Coast parks leadership.

parkioInsight.text: Leadership transitions at Disneyland sometimes bring surprise announcements or soft launches of new initiatives. Watch for any resort updates or policy changes through the fall season.

bignews.title: Moana-themed sundae and pineapple drink debut at Animal Kingdom
bignews.body: The Motunui Ube Sundae features ube soft-serve, tropical fruits, coconut, and raspberry crumbs at the Anandapur Ice Cream Truck. A new pineapple drink is also available, timed to the live-action Moana remake release.

parkioInsight.text: Movie tie-in treats often sell out by mid-afternoon on opening week. Swing by Anandapur before lunch if you want to try the sundae without a line.

bignews.title: Disneyland welcomes one billionth guest milestone
bignews.body: The resort celebrated seven decades and one billion total guests with a ceremony at the park entrance on July 3. The milestone comes just days before Disneyland's 71st birthday.

parkioInsight.text: Anniversary celebrations sometimes extend into the weeks that follow. Look for special photo ops or surprise character appearances near the Main Street hub through mid-July.

topstories.title: New truffle burger debuts at Cosmic Ray's for late-night dining
topstories.body: Magic Kingdom's largest quick-service restaurant now offers a truffle burger aimed at extended-hours guests. The addition addresses the park's longstanding weak late-night food lineup.

parkioInsight.text: Late-night dining in Magic Kingdom tends to have shorter lines after 9pm. If you're staying for fireworks, this is likely your best counter-service bet without leaving Tomorrowland.

topstories.title: Carousel of Progress closes for reimagining; fan footage surfaces
topstories.body: Following the official closure of the Magic Kingdom classic, superfans shared detailed walk-through videos they captured during a rare theater access opportunity. Disney has filed a general construction notice for the attraction.

parkioInsight.text: Tomorrowland capacity drops with Carousel dark. Space Mountain and TRON waits may run 10–15 minutes longer during peak afternoon hours through the refurbishment.

topstories.title: New Mickey Bar variety launches at Disneyland
topstories.body: Disneyland has introduced a new flavor variation of the iconic frozen treat. The updated bar joins the classic vanilla version at several park carts.

parkioInsight.text: New Mickey Bar flavors typically move fast in the first week, especially at Main Street and Fantasyland carts. Grab one before noon to avoid sellouts.

topstories.title: Polynesian Village road closure begins in six days
topstories.body: A major road shutdown near the Polynesian Village Resort starts July 13. The closure affects access routes and parking for resort guests and monorail riders.

parkioInsight.text: If you're driving to the Polynesian or planning a meal reservation there next week, add 10–15 minutes for alternate routes. Monorail access remains unaffected.

topstories.title: July 2026 is slowest month at Disney World since September 2021
topstories.body: Despite sold-out Annual Passholder reservations over Independence Day, overall wait times and crowd levels remain historically low. The trend continues less than a week into the month.

parkioInsight.text: July's low crowds make this one of the best summer touring windows in five years. Hitting attractions before 11am likely keeps most waits under 30 minutes across all four parks.

topstories.title: 2027 planDisney panelist search opens
topstories.body: Disney has launched the annual search for the next class of planDisney panelists, who help guests plan vacations and share vacation tips. Applications are now open for 2027.

parkioInsight.text: If you're a frequent visitor with planning expertise, applying could land you a front-row seat to Disney news and access to special events. The panel typically meets virtually and attends in-park sessions.

topstories.title: Benny the security dog retires after six years at Disneyland
topstories.body: The canine cast member, who spent six years keeping the resort safe, was honored with a retirement party. Benny's service marks the end of a long chapter in Disneyland security operations.

parkioInsight.text: Security dogs often work near park entrances and bag check. If you spot a working K9 today, it's likely part of Benny's team continuing the safety work he started.

icymi.title: Mickey's of Glendale returns to D23 with new Imagineering collection
icymi.body: The fan-favorite booth will be back at D23: The Ultimate Disney Fan Event this year, offering exclusive Walt Disney Imagineering merchandise and collectibles.

icymi.title: Disney announces America's 250th anniversary celebration
icymi.body: Disney Celebrates America will run from Veterans Day 2025 through July 4, 2026 weekend, with special entertainment, patriotic experiences, and events across parks and cruise ships.

icymi.title: Nomad Lounge adds new drink to menu at Animal Kingdom
icymi.body: The popular lounge has introduced a specialty drink featuring edible bees as garnish. The new beverage joins Nomad's rotating cocktail list.

spotlight.title: Anaheim resident ticket deal for $71 sells out fast
spotlight.body: Disneyland's new summer and Halloween discount ticket for local residents has already sold out for several dates. The $71 offer provides access to both Disneyland and California Adventure during select windows.

parkioInsight.text: Resident deals tend to drive heavier local crowds on weekends and holidays. If you're visiting on a discounted date, rope-drop and late evenings usually offer the best touring windows.
